entry.title: New: RES24-229 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF CONFERENCE REGISTRATION AND LODGING VALUED AT $4,263.94 TO THE CITY FROM THE HAWAIʻI EXECUTIVE COLLABORATIVE FOR THE MAYOR AND MANAGING DIRECTOR TO ATTEND THE HAWAII EXECUTIVE CONFERENCE ON THE ISLAND OF HAWAII, OCTOBER 2—5, 2024.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
